cit.basis: Flat 30% impôt sur les sociétés (IS) on taxable profit (Code Général des Impôts du Sénégal).

minimum_tax.name: Impôt minimum forfaitaire (IMF)
minimum_tax.note: 0.5% of annual turnover, due when it exceeds the profit-based IS; national floor/cap amounts apply per the CGI.

cit.note: Administered by the DGID (Direction générale des Impôts et des Domaines).

vat.name: TVA
vat.note: Standard 18% TVA; reduced 10% rate applies to tourism/hospitality services.

official_sources.name: DGID — Direction générale des Impôts et des Domaines (Sénégal)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
IMF floor/cap bounds, sector regimes, WHT, relief and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official DGID guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
